{{Quote|You have to let us have it. Please. We need to know everything we can about the Death Star.|Riij Winward, to Shada D'ukal|<ref name="Tonnika">{{StoryCite|story=Hammertong: The Tale of the "Tonnika Sisters"|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Riij Winward''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a procurement specialist. He was stationed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
Winward was born in [[Calius saj Leeloo]] on [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]]. After his older brother was pressed into [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] services, he stowed away on a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] to get out of the Empire's reach. When the freighter rendezvoused with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], Winward was discovered and joined the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="ST" />

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> Winward helped [[Shada D'ukal]] and [[Karoly D'ulin]], who were disguised as the [[Tonnika sisters/Legends|Tonnika sisters]] at that time, to escape from a local prison in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. He intended to get some information about the [[Hammertong/Legends|Hammertong]], a prototypical part of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] laser. Eventually, the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]]s wouldn't allow him to take the part of the weapon with him, but Winward stole their [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] [[D4]], along with a technical readout of the device—promising politely to return it once the Alliance had acquired the information.<ref name="Tonnika" />

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="ERC" /> he and [[Rathe Palror]] were ordered to look after a load of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] smuggled to [[Derra IV/Legends|Derra IV]] by [[Haber Trell]] and [[Maranne Darmic]]. On their way, they were captured by the Imperial Star Destroyer ''[[Admonitor]]''. Captain [[Dagon Niriz]] instructed them to [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|deliver]] an unknown load to [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. While on Corellia he and Rathe got into a fight they nearly lost with the [[Brommstaad Mercenaries]] and even told [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] why anyone should join the Rebellion.<ref name="ST" />
